title: WhoIsLooking
body:
Adds a looking meter. It tells you when someone looking at you or when you looking at someone.

With default settings, when you in field of view of any entity, you get alerted.

There is 2 modes of alertion: 
- first (yellow eye) when you are in field of view but if they was normal people, they cant clearly see you in side of view; 
- second (red eye) when they are looking at you and see you clearly!

All of this is customizable in settings.

Its like become weeping angel.

**I DARE YOU to speedrun with this mod!!**

Made to showcase how frustum works.

<details>
<summary>Press **G** to open options</summary>

**OnlyPlayers** - make mod work only with players

**Invert** - make when YOU looking at someone triggering mod

**StopMoving** - make YOU stop move when EYE is RED

</details>

Some features may not work in early versions

If you find blocks that not full/transparent and you still detected/detecting, please report it in my discord.
